violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Observed wet wiping cloth on food prep counter rather than in sanitizing solution.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed tape on oven control knob.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed bucket with towels in hand sink.--Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Observed hand sink blocked by mop and broom.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Observed towel dispenser was empty, or inoperable at time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor under fryer needs to be cleaned.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — ---Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed sides and doors of appliances need to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. -Observed dead flies on hand sink.--Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Observed broom and mop in front of hand sink not allowing easyy access.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
